system_families.name: monolithic_recurrent_world_model
system_families.notes: Generic strong baseline without explicit memory partitioning.

system_families.name: persistent_memory_world_model
system_families.notes: Memory-heavy baseline for long-horizon partial observability.

system_families.name: relational_graph_world_model
system_families.notes: Sparse relational baseline for embodied structure.

system_families.name: classical_belief_update_planner
system_families.notes: Classical occupancy-map baseline that detects local post-intervention mismatches and updates edges, costs, dynamics, and token bindings before replanning.

system_families.name: pretrained_structured_graph_world_model
system_families.notes: Higher-capacity structured graph world model pretrained across generated train motifs and evaluated as an append-only learned baseline.

system_families.name: prismx_reference_model
system_families.notes: Not part of the release artifact because this reference model is not implemented.
